{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/74800891?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/therawdev", "id": 74800891, "login": "therawdev", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc0ODAwODkx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/therawdev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55882", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Summary
The Tilt HUD server mounts Go's `net/http/pprof` handlers under `/debug` with no access control. When the HUD is network-exposed, an attacker can read process memory — including session and apiserver tokens — and hold the process under profiling.

## Details
A blank import of `net/http/pprof` registers its handlers on `http.DefaultServeMux`, which the HUD controller mounts under `/debug` on both the web router and the apiserver listener. `/debug/pprof/heap` and `/goroutine` expose process memory, including the session token (also issued in the `Tilt-Token` cookie) and the apiserver loopback bearer token; `/profile` and `/trace` let a caller sample the process for an arbitrary duration.

## Impact
An unauthenticated caller who can reach the listener can extract process memory — including the session and apiserver tokens — and degrade performance by holding the process under CPU profiling or tracing. The leaked tokens compound the missing-authentication finding on the same server.

### Conditions for exploitation
- Affected version in `>= 0.19.5, <= 0.37.3`.
- HUD (or apiserver) listener bound to a non-loopback address (`tilt up --host 0.0.0.0`, or `TILT_HOST` set).
- Network reachability to the listener (default port `10350`).

### Not affected
- The default loopback-only bind is not reachable from the network.

## Workarounds
Use the default loopback bind (omit `--host`, unset `TILT_HOST`) so `/debug` is not remotely reachable. No complete workaround short of upgrading for non-loopback deployments.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00384, "percentile": 0.30558}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p749-9w62-w533", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T13:52:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p749-9w62-w533", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p749-9w62-w533"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55882"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T13:52:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/security/advisories/GHSA-p749-9w62-w533", "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/pull/6776", "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt/releases/tag/v0.37.4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p749-9w62-w533"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tilt-dev/tilt/security-advisories/GHSA-p749-9w62-w533", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tilt-dev/tilt", "summary": "Tilt: Unauthenticated pprof debug endpoints on the Tilt HUD server", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T13:52:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p749-9w62-w533", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.37.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/tilt-dev/tilt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.19.5, <= 0.37.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Tilt: Unauthenticated pprof debug endpoints on the Tilt HUD server
